contract.title: Will Bitcoin be above $109,999.99 by Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?
contract.resolution_criteria: If the Bitcoin spot price according to the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index is above $109999.99 starting 01/02/2026 06:00 PM and before Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.

conditions.label: BTC > $109,999.99 on CF RT Index
conditions.summary: YES if, at any moment from Jan 2, 2026 6:00 PM ET (inclusive) to before Dec 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index spot price is strictly > $109,999.99 USD.

contract.narrative: Liquidity-boosting moves by CME, ICE, and Coinbase (24/7 market‑maker programs, expanded hours) and a pending Nasdaq listing for BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF lift institutional access and odds of a >$110k print. Countervailing pressure comes from bank capital and AML reforms, SEC actions, and the NY AG suit. Pending: ETF approval, AML rule finalization, and litigation outcomes.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Nasdaq CME Crypto Index Futures Market Maker Program | [2]
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat
timeline.one_line_why: CME’s market‑maker program for crypto futures likely modestly increases liquidity/institutional flow, slightly raising odds BTC breaches $110k but not decisive.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Options 24/7 Weekend Market MakerProgram | [2]
timeline.one_line_why: CME’s 24/7 weekend market-maker program increases crypto liquidity and continuous price discovery, modestly raising odds BTC tops $109,999 before year-end.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Futures 24/7 Weekend Market Maker Program | [2]
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat
timeline.one_line_why: CME's 24/7 weekend market maker program increases futures liquidity and continuous price discovery, slightly raising chances BTC spot crosses $109,999 sooner.

timeline.title: CME | Expansion of the Trading and ClearingHours for all Cryptocurrency Futures and Options on Futures Contracts. | [1]
timeline.one_line_why: CME's expanded crypto futures trading/clearing hours raise liquidity and price discovery, slightly affecting odds BTC breaches $110k but not determinative.

timeline.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change, as Modified by Amendment No. 1 Thereto, to List and Trade Shares of iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF under Nasdaq Rule 5711(d) (CommodityBased Trust...
timeline.one_line_why: SEC notice for Nasdaq listing of BlackRock iShares Bitcoin ETF raises institutional demand expectations, increasing chances BTC tops $110k by end-2026.
timeline.effective_date: The Shares will not trade on the Exchange until such time that the Registration Statement is effective.

timeline.title: Attorney General James Sues Coinbase and Gemini for Running Illegal Gambling Platforms in New York
timeline.regulator: New York Attorney General — Investor Protection Bureau
timeline.one_line_why: NY AG suing Coinbase and Gemini may hurt liquidity/trust on major exchanges that feed the CF index, lowering odds BTC exceeds $109,999.99.

timeline.title: COIN | Crypto Market Maker Program - 04/16/2026
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC action on Coinbase's crypto market-maker program could modestly boost BTC liquidity and price, slightly increasing odds BTC exceeds $109,999.99 in 2026.

timeline.title: COIN | Addition of a new Exchange functionality… - 04/16/2026
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC action enabling new Coinbase exchange functionality could modestly raise liquidity/demand for BTC, slightly increasing odds it exceeds $109,999.99.

timeline.title: CME | Modifications to the FTIIE Futures Market Maker Program
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat
timeline.one_line_why: CME changes affect bitcoin futures liquidity and trading dynamics, giving a small indirect impact on spot price likelihood but not determinative of a $110k move.

timeline.title: BTNL | Clearing Member Rules Update
timeline.one_line_why: A CFTC clearing-member rules update for Bitnomial could modestly affect crypto derivatives clearing/liquidity, slightly increasing chances BTC hits $110k.

timeline.title: FinCEN Proposes Rule to Fundamentally Reform Financial Institution Programs Designed to Fight Illicit Finance
timeline.one_line_why: FinCEN's AML overhaul raises compliance friction for institutions and crypto firms, likely reducing demand and making BTC >$110k less likely.

timeline.title: Regulatory Capital: Standardized Approach for Risk-Weighted Assets
timeline.regulator: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
timeline.one_line_why: OCC's standardized risk-weighting could raise banks' capital costs for crypto exposures, reducing institutional demand and lowering odds BTC tops $110k.

timeline.title: Regulatory Capital: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations With Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations
timeline.regulator: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
timeline.one_line_why: OCC capital rules for banks with significant trading could curb banks' crypto exposure, lowering demand for BTC and making >$109,999 less likely.

timeline.title: ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Liquidity Provider Program
timeline.one_line_why: ICE/CFTC liquidity program for crypto futures should improve trading depth and price discovery, modestly boosting BTC’s chance of >$109,999 in 2026.

timeline.title: ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Market Maker Program
timeline.one_line_why: ICE market-maker program boosts crypto futures liquidity and participation, modestly increasing odds BTC crosses $110k sooner.

timeline.title: COIN | Modifications to the Perp Style Futures Market Maker Program
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC changes to Coinbase’s perp futures market-maker program can alter BTC liquidity and price discovery, modestly affecting chance of hitting $110k.

timeline.title: COIN Modifications to the Non-Crypto Market Maker Program
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC-approved changes to Coinbase Derivatives' market-maker program could modestly alter liquidity/volatility and slightly affect BTC price discovery.

timeline.title: CME - Modifications to the Cryptocurrency Options Market Maker Program
timeline.one_line_why: CME changes to the crypto options market-maker program can modestly affect BTC liquidity and price discovery, giving an incremental signal but not decisive.

timeline.title: Litigation Releases: Nathan Gauvin; Blackridge, LLC; Gray Digital Capital Management USA, LLC; Gray Digital Technologies, LLC
timeline.regulator: U.S. SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION — Fort Worth Regional Office
timeline.one_line_why: SEC litigation against crypto firms (Gray Digital, Blackridge) raises regulatory risk and likely lowers near‑term odds BTC exceeds $109,999 by end-2026.

timeline.title: Acting Chairman Pham Announces Launch of Digital Assets Pilot Program for Tokenized Collateral in Derivatives Markets
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Market Participants Division, Division of Market Oversight, Division of Clearing and Risk
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC pilot to allow tokenized collateral in derivatives could raise institutional demand/liquidity for Bitcoin, making a >$109,999 print more likely.

primary_drivers: CME launched 24/7 weekend crypto futures and options market-maker programs
CME expanded trading and clearing hours for cryptocurrency futures
Attorney General lawsuit vs Coinbase/Gemini and Nasdaq/COIN exchange filings
heat_panel.explainer: Heat driven by rapid CME rollouts of 24/7 weekend trading and market-maker programs plus exchange filings and an AG lawsuit heightening crypto regulatory scrutiny.
